name: Latitude Bare Metal Installer Test
description: End-to-end test of the CTO Platform installer on Latitude.sh bare metal infrastructure. Tests server provisioning, Talos bootstrap, Kubernetes setup, and GitOps deployment.

cleanupProcedure.description: MANDATORY cleanup before starting fresh - run ALL steps
steps: 1. Delete servers via Latitude MCP: list servers, delete each one
2. Delete VLAN via Latitude MCP if created
5. Verify no orphaned resources in Latitude dashboard

userStories.title: Pre-Flight: Verify Tools Installed
userStories.description: Verify all required CLI tools are installed and accessible
acceptanceCriteria: argocd CLI is installed: which argocd
Installer binary exists: ls target/release/installer || cargo build --release -p installer

userStories.title: Pre-Flight: Verify Latitude API Access
userStories.description: Verify Latitude.sh API is accessible via MCP
acceptanceCriteria: Latitude MCP server is connected (claude mcp list shows latitude)
Can list servers via MCP (may return empty list)
API key is valid (no auth errors)

userStories.title: Pre-Flight: Verify Talos MCP Access
acceptanceCriteria: Talos MCP server is connected (claude mcp list shows talos-mcp)
MCP server responds to health check

userStories.title: Infrastructure: Create Servers
userStories.description: Provision bare metal servers on Latitude.sh
acceptanceCriteria: Server IDs recorded in coordination state

userStories.title: Infrastructure: Create VLAN
userStories.description: Create private network for node-to-node communication
acceptanceCriteria: Private IPs allocated for each server
VLAN details recorded in coordination state

userStories.title: Infrastructure: Servers Ready
userStories.description: Wait for servers to be in 'on' state
acceptanceCriteria: All servers reach 'on' status within 15 minutes
No servers stuck in 'off' or 'deploying' state
Server IPs are assigned and reachable

userStories.title: Talos: iPXE Boot
acceptanceCriteria: iPXE reinstall triggered for all servers
Talos maintenance mode reached within 15 minutes

userStories.title: Talos: Generate Configs
userStories.description: Generate Talos machine configs and secrets
acceptanceCriteria: VLAN interface configured in machine configs

userStories.title: Talos: Apply Configs
userStories.description: Apply machine configs to all nodes
acceptanceCriteria: Nodes reboot and install Talos to disk
All nodes reachable via talosctl after reboot

userStories.title: Kubernetes: Bootstrap Cluster
userStories.description: Bootstrap etcd and Kubernetes control plane
acceptanceCriteria: kubectl get nodes returns control plane node

userStories.title: Kubernetes: Deploy Cilium CNI
userStories.description: Deploy Cilium as the cluster CNI
acceptanceCriteria: Cilium agent pods running on all nodes

userStories.title: Kubernetes: Workers Join
acceptanceCriteria: All worker nodes appear in kubectl get nodes

userStories.title: GitOps: Apply App-of-Apps
userStories.description: Apply the app-of-apps manifest to deploy platform stack

userStories.title: GitOps: Full Sync Complete
userStories.description: All GitOps applications synced and healthy
acceptanceCriteria: No applications in Degraded or Unknown state

userStories.title: Post-GitOps: OpenBao Bootstrap
userStories.description: Initialize and configure OpenBao secrets management

userStories.title: Post-GitOps: Kubeconfig Configured
userStories.description: Merge kubeconfig for kubectl and Lens access
acceptanceCriteria: Can connect to cluster from local machine

userStories.title: Verification: Cluster Health
userStories.description: Final verification that cluster is healthy and operational
acceptanceCriteria: All nodes Ready: kubectl get nodes shows all Ready
All system pods Running: kubectl get pods -n kube-system
ArgoCD accessible: argocd app list works
Can create test workload: kubectl run test --image=nginx
Test workload runs successfully and can be deleted
